title: Eva project
wikitext:
[]: Eva "project"             Quote Post by Jinroh » Wed May 09, 2007 9:12 am Hello, I'm new around here, so I don't really know if it's been discussed about already or not, but I was wondering if it was possible to get the eva "project"... It's a 33 pages document which introduces the serie and talk about the characters, has a brief description of all 26 episodes and a few pictures in which evas have very old and totally different designs. I've always been curious about that stuff, and excited about how the epidoes were supposed to be... Some are the same, some are slightly different and some others totally changed. At the end 12 angels were supposed to come on earth from the moon and destroy humankind... I wish they made it true in a game or something like that. Does anyone have informations about this document? I have some scans in a big evangelion book, but it's really small...

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Wed May 09, 2007 9:26 am Sigh, if the Angels destroyed their fellow mankind, where would there be the Human Instrumentality? I have a book called Neon Genesis Evangelion Special Collection, at the end there was something that looked like a proposal. It resembled of the 'Eva Project' you mentioned- 33 pages, 12 Angels, but it was stated in the end that there would be a happy ending. But the thing is, the proposal was a Chinese translation.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Wed May 09, 2007 9:43 am I don't know about a happy ending. But at the end it's stated that after the 12 angels arrive on earth, USA as well as eva-06 are destroyed in a big explosion, and humankind is on the brink of destruction...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 09, 2007 9:46 am Jinroh, you're talking about the Proposal. Most of it is published in Newtype 100% Collection -- ludicrously small, albeit readable -- but the last two pages are missing. They omitted ones featuring proto-Sachiel and -Arael, along with two unused "Apostolos", and relabeled page 35 as 33 so you wouldn't suspect a thing. Evangelion Chronicle has been reprinting them, full-size, at one or two pages per issue. They might have finished by now, for all I know. I am not up-to-date with my issues. At. All. The last Proposal page I have is 11. Thumbnails of all 35.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Wed May 09, 2007 10:10 am Yes, that's exactly what I'm talking about. But I've seen pages 33 and 34 somewhere else... Maybe in adam's book? I don't remember. But you're right, on the version I have they renamed page 35. I wish we had more "beta" material like that. I personally think the angels were more original and had a better design in some ways. I'm quite unhappy with some final designs.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed May 09, 2007 10:53 am I had a few translated by a fellow in Japan, but our working relationship dissolved a bit as my studies took precadence.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 09, 2007 11:11 am The Eva Monkey wrote: I had a few translated by a fellow in Japan, but our working relationship dissolved a bit as my studies took precadence.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed May 09, 2007 11:40 am Reichu wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: I had a few translated by a fellow in Japan, but our working relationship dissolved a bit as my studies took precadence.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Wed May 09, 2007 11:53 am Oh, I have the translations in french, but there's nothing really interesting. I mean, the texts are very short anyway, and there's nothing really "deep" inside. I wish we had the complete story of what evangelion was supposed to be. Also, I'd like to know what Anno had in his mind before he did eps 25 and 26. I think it would have been something like EoE, but much lighter and less horrible. edit: there's something interesting in the last episodes though, about a relic called "haruka", or something like that. I wish I knew more about it and what it was supposed to do.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 09, 2007 12:15 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: To be honest, I never worked out distribution with the fellow.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Wed May 09, 2007 12:22 pm If someone has any informations about what I'm talking about in the "edit" I wrote up there... Well, in the past I had a lot of debates about EoE. I was absolutely not surprised by this movie afterward. Looking at the pervious episodes it was clear that Tokyo-3's destruction helped Seele and that they were producing mass evas. EoE is the "real" end, but I am pretty sure that it's very different from what it was supposed to be. This movie is filled with too much extremes and "hatred" to be what was originally planned. Or maybe not. Even in normal eps 25 and 26, we can see a dead Ritsuko floating on lcl and Misato bleeding against a wall (if I remember correctly). And Asuka in foetal position in her eva. So... who knows. [I've always been thinking that actually both end could be happening at the same time, the tv ending being more "conceptual" and giving some hope for EoE's aftermath.) About the translations... Would you like me to give them in english? It will be approximate, but maybe helpful?

[]:             Quote Post by Ejinathan » Wed May 09, 2007 12:29 pm Translations in french hum... I'm French btw :)

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Wed May 09, 2007 12:49 pm These translations are in the "le grand livre de neon genesis evangelion". If anybody is interested, I'll translate that today.

[]:             Quote Post by Ejinathan » Wed May 09, 2007 1:09 pm I got the book .... i think admin is against this here :s

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 09, 2007 1:13 pm Jinroh wrote: These translations are in the "le grand livre de neon genesis evangelion".

[]:             Quote Post by Ejinathan » Wed May 09, 2007 1:37 pm Reichu wrote French version of Newtype 100% . I wonder why French and German versions would get published, but no English one. ::/

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Wed May 09, 2007 1:40 pm ok, here I go for page 25: PAGE 25 Episode #02: "Unknow ceilors" During her battle against the Angel, the Eva-01 goes berserk. Her revealed power is bigger than expected. Cut from Shinjin's mind, she rushes at the Angel. Reactions of the staff about the eva and the Angel. In this unknown city begins a new life for Shinji. Shinji and Misato get along well. Episode #03: "First phone call" Shinji arrives in his new school. He has the occasion, for the first time, to make friends. Important operations happen in Tokyo-3. Episode #04: "14 years old, the first day" It's Shinji's birthday. His father doesn't have anything nice to say to him. Misato cares about Shinji. Description of Nerv characters' drama. Episode #05: "Rei, beyond her heart" Rei and Shinji begin to know each other more. A frightening and powerful Angel arrives. The evas are defeated. The research center is in a critical situation. Episode #06: "Decisive battle in Tokyo-3" Decisive battle between men and Angels. The evas strike back. Shinji begins to understand Nerv people. Episode #07: "Built by men" A battle humanoid, different from the evas, is built by a private company. Tests occur. Nerv feels isolated. Episode #08: "Asuka arrives in Japan" Asuka, eva-02 and Ryoji appear. Battleships against giant robots. Hand-to hand battle on a carrier. -------------------------------------------------------- This translations is not so easy. It's already translated from short sentences in Japanese... and as I said before, it's not really "interesting", in the way that it's only a brief description of each episode. Without a clear context, a few things are really hard to understand. Sorry for the weird english as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Ejinathan » Wed May 09, 2007 2:04 pm [quote="Jinroh"] Without a clear context, a few things are really hard to understand. Sorry for the weird english as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Wed May 09, 2007 2:11 pm Yep, well, let's see what people think about this translation, and if it's good enough, then I'll translate the other pages little by little.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed May 09, 2007 2:13 pm This seems to be the same thing that MDWigs posted on ANF aeons ago , and I put up on my site .
